overall.description: A first-person perspective walk along a wooden railroad trestle bridge in a mountainous wilderness area, characteristic of Red Dead Redemption 2. The camera moves steadily along the tracks, pausing to pan and reveal a canyon with a waterfall below, before continuing toward a rock cut tunnel entrance through the mountain.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden railroad trestle bridge spanning mountain valley

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the railroad tracks on the elevated wooden trestle bridge

entered.detail: weathered wooden railroad bridge with cross-tie decking and metal rails
rusted steel rails with wooden ties running along the bridge deck
simple wooden railings along the sides of the trestle bridge
dense pine and fir trees covering the mountain slopes
distant mountain peak with visible snow patches under clear sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking along a weathered wooden railroad trestle bridge high above a mountain valley. The wooden deck and metal rails extend forward toward a distant snow-capped mountain, flanked by dense coniferous forests on the hillsides.

events.description: camera stops forward movement and pans right to look down into the canyon below

agents.ego_description: pausing to pan the camera and observe the waterfall and canyon scenery below the bridge

entered.detail: steep rocky canyon walls with layered rock formations
small waterfall cascading down the canyon wall into the pool below
calm water pool at the base of the canyon surrounded by rocks

segments.scene_description: The camera pans right to reveal a dramatic view of the canyon below the trestle. A waterfall cascades down the rocky cliff face into a serene pool, with the wooden bridge structure now visible along the left edge of the frame. The distant mountain and forest are no longer in view.

events.description: camera pans back to forward-facing position and resumes walking along the curved track

agents.ego_description: resuming forward movement along the gently curving railroad tracks

entered.detail: tall mountain peak becoming visible ahead as the track curves
grass-covered rocky terrain rising alongside the bridge

segments.scene_description: The camera returns to facing forward along the tracks, which curve gently to the right along the mountainside. The mountain peak becomes visible in the distance ahead, while rocky hillsides rise on the right. The canyon and waterfall are now behind and out of view.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching rock cut tunnel through mountain

agents.ego_description: continuing along the tracks as the bridge approaches a rock cut tunnel entrance

entered.detail: dark opening where the railroad enters a cut through the rock formation
tall vertical rock face rising immediately beside the tracks

segments.scene_description: The bridge continues toward a rock cut tunnel entrance ahead. A massive rocky cliff wall rises on the right side, while the forested valley remains visible on the left. The lighting becomes slightly darker as the tunnel entrance approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: final approach to dark tunnel entrance

events.description: ambient light decreases significantly as the camera approaches the dark tunnel mouth

agents.ego_description: approaching the dark tunnel entrance at the end of the trestle bridge

entered.detail: shadowed tunnel mouth cut through solid rock, appearing at the end of the bridge

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the approach to the dark tunnel entrance at the end of the trestle. The rock walls close in on both sides, and the lighting dims significantly as the camera nears the shadowed tunnel mouth. The wooden bridge structure continues right up to the rock cut opening.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey across a high wooden railroad trestle that transitions from an open mountain vista into the shadowed mouth of a rock tunnel. It begins by moving steadily along weathered planks and metal rails toward a distant snow-capped peak, flanked by dense coniferous forests. As the camera pans right, the perspective shifts to reveal a dramatic canyon below where a waterfall cascades down a rocky cliff into a serene pool. The view then returns to the tracks, which curve gently along the mountainside and lead toward a massive rocky cliff wall that begins to loom over the right side of the frame. Finally, the environment closes in as the lighting dims significantly, guiding the camera from the open air of the bridge into the dark, shadowed entrance of the rock cut tunnel.
